metrics.name: Total CEO and Vice Chairman remuneration (Cash)
Total CEO and Vice Chairman remuneration
Total CEO and Vice Chairman remuneration as % of Net Income (After Tax)

financial_pages.notes: Names of executives and remuneration distribution: Ping Cheng (Chairman, Strategic Steering Committee, Mark Ko, President), Yancey Hai (Vice-Chairman, CEO), James Tang (Executive Vice-President), Johnson Lee (Senior Vice-President), Ted Shyy (Vice-President of Power Electronics Business Category), Beau Yu (Corporate CFO), Shalin Chen. Aggregated cash remuneration for CEO and Vice Chairman was NT$265,100 thousand (0.75% of net income after tax).

metrics.name: Annual revenue and EPS - both annual revenue and EPS hit record high

financial_pages.notes: From CEO Letter to Shareholders. Operating margin and EPS hit record high; consolidated revenue NT$421.1bn (+5%), net operating profit NT$47.7bn (+32.4%), operating margin 11.3% (+2.4pp), net income after-tax NT$41.8bn (+16.4%), EPS NT$16.06.

metrics.name: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent (Capital stock)

financial_pages.notes: Consolidated Balance Sheet (5-year section visible for 2023-2024). Page heading: Review and Analysis of Financial Position and Financial Performance, and Risk Assessment. Multi-year data may extend further; only 2023 and 2024 captured here.

people_pages.page_section: Implementation of Evaluation of the Board of Directors
people_pages.notes: Description of evaluation cycles, scopes, methods, and 2024 evaluation results for Board, Audit Committee and Compensation Committee. Average score for the Board of Directors evaluation was 4.91 out of 5. No individual director listing on this page.

people_pages.page_section: Implementation of Evaluation of the Board of Directors (continued)
people_pages.notes: Continuation of board evaluation discussion. Notes on independent reviewer recommendations and Compensation Committee response. No individual director listing.
